vehicle.cab_type: high-roof sleeper cab (visible from side window profile and roof height)
vehicle.viewing_angle: full frontal, very slightly to the left
vehicle.camera_height: low (camera appears to be at or just below the headlight level)

composition.important_crop_information: full cab, left bumper mostly visible, right rear of chassis cropped

company_identity.position: top of cab, on a lightbox/banner above windshield, horizontal orientation
company_identity.appearance: white uppercase lettering with Dutch flag stripes on each side, black background, 2 astronaut figures at each end

owner_signatures.position: each end of the 'DUTCH COMMANDER' banner/lightbox

roof_lights.position: front edge of cab roof, above windshield
roof_lights.arrangement: horizontal row (slight arc), 4 left, 4 right of center banner

grille_lights.position: front grille, centered on lower grille section

main_headlights.position: far left and right lower front corners of the cab

front_geometry.grille_description: two wide horizontal bars, with central 'MAN' badge zone, outlined by metallic bezel, lower bar split by integrated auxiliary lamps
front_geometry.headlight_description: two main headlights, rectangular with sharp angular points, each with integrated indicator and possible LED strip
front_geometry.bumper_description: wide, deep, color-matched with sculpted contours, lower edge features accent line

uncertain_items: model designation not identifiable on grille or other visible locations
license plate area present but text is not readable
